full_text:
Du Tong 杜通
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Tong (杜通). In 220, was arrested by Zhang Jin and his position usurped. Restored by Su Ze. Du Tong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
